footer.tagline: AI-powered retinal screening for early eye disease detection. Built for speed, accuracy, and accessibility.
footer.disclaimer: ⚠️ For screening assistance only. Not a substitute for professional medical diagnosis.

landing.subtext: Upload a retinal fundus image and receive an instant AI-powered screening report with diagnosis, confidence score, and clinical recommendations designed for patients, clinics, and screening camps.
landing.whyTitle: Why Early Eye Disease Detection Matters
landing.whyDesc: Millions of people lose vision each year not because treatment is unavailable, but because diseases are detected too late. EyeScreen AI helps make early retinal screening faster, more accessible, and easier to scale for real-world use.
landing.why1: Over 2.2 billion people globally have vision impairment.
landing.why2: At least 1 billion cases are preventable due to late detection.
landing.why3: Rural and low-income populations have the least access to eye specialists.
landing.why4: AI screening can bridge the gap — fast, affordable, and scalable.
landing.stat4Label: Time for AI to screen one patient
landing.howDesc: A simple four-step flow designed for patients, clinics, and eye screening camps.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up in seconds — no credit card required.
landing.step2Desc: Fill in name, ID, age, and the eye being scanned.
landing.step3Desc: Drag and drop a fundus photograph from your device.
landing.step4Desc: Receive diagnosis, confidence score, and recommendations.
landing.whyAIDesc: Built for speed, screening support, and a better healthcare experience.
landing.feat1Desc: Upload a retinal image and receive a detailed screening report in under 3 seconds.
landing.feat2Desc: Model trained on 80,000+ annotated retinal images across diverse patient populations.
landing.feat3Desc: Screens for diabetic retinopathy, glaucoma, macular degeneration, and more.
landing.feat4Desc: Confidence scores, risk levels, and actionable clinical recommendations instantly.
landing.condDesc: AI-assisted support for major retinal and eye health conditions.
landing.disclaimerText: EyeScreen AI is an assistive screening tool and does not provide a definitive medical diagnosis. All results must be reviewed and confirmed by a qualified ophthalmologist or medical professional before any clinical decision is made.
landing.ctaDesc: Choose how you want to access EyeScreen AI and start your screening workflow in seconds.

about.title: We're on a Mission to End Preventable Blindness
about.subtitle: EyeScreen AI was built during a hackathon by Team Blur Busters — a group of developers passionate about using technology to solve real healthcare problems.
about.missionText: To make early eye disease detection accessible to every healthcare worker — regardless of location, resources, or access to specialists. We believe AI can act as a first-level screening tool that saves sight and saves lives.
about.visionText: A world where no one loses their vision due to a disease that could have been caught early. We envision AI-assisted screening becoming a standard part of primary healthcare in every community, especially underserved ones.
about.problemSub: Preventable blindness is a global crisis hiding in plain sight
about.problemText1: In rural India and many developing regions, patients travel hours to see an eye specialist — only to find out their condition has progressed beyond treatment. The bottleneck isn't treatment availability. It's early detection.
about.problemText2: EyeScreen AI puts a powerful screening tool in the hands of any healthcare worker with a fundus camera and an internet connection. No specialist required for the first step.
about.val1Desc: Every prediction is backed by a model trained on tens of thousands of clinically annotated retinal images.
about.val2Desc: We build for the patient — faster detection, clearer reports, and better outcomes.
about.val3Desc: Designed for healthcare workers in rural and low-resource settings, not just specialists.
about.val4Desc: We clearly communicate confidence scores and always recommend specialist verification.
about.ai1: AI can analyze a retinal image in under 3 seconds — faster than any human specialist.
about.ai2: Deep learning models detect subtle patterns invisible to the untrained eye.
about.ai3: AI screening scales infinitely — one model can serve thousands of patients simultaneously.
about.ai4: It reduces the burden on specialists by pre-filtering low-risk cases.
about.ai5: It empowers non-specialist healthcare workers to make informed referral decisions.
about.ai6: Early detection through AI can reduce treatment costs by up to 80%.

low.label: Low Risk — No immediate action required

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about EyeScreen AI — how it works, what the results mean, and how your data is handled.
faq.stillDesc: Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out to our team directly.
faq.q1: How does EyeScreen AI detect eye diseases?
faq.a1: EyeScreen AI uses a deep learning model (CNN) trained on over 80,000 annotated retinal fundus images. When you upload an image, the model analyzes patterns in the retina to identify signs of disease.
faq.a2: Our model achieves 94.7% detection accuracy across 5+ conditions. Always verify results with a qualified ophthalmologist.
faq.q3: What type of images does the system accept?
faq.a3: EyeScreen AI accepts retinal fundus photographs in JPG, PNG, or TIFF format, up to 10 MB. Minimum resolution: 512×512 pixels.
faq.q4: How long does the analysis take?
faq.a4: Analysis typically completes in under 3 seconds after the image is uploaded.
faq.q5: Can EyeScreen AI replace an ophthalmologist?
faq.a5: No. EyeScreen AI is a screening assistance tool. All results must be reviewed by a qualified ophthalmologist before any clinical decision is made.
faq.q6: What does the screening report include?
faq.a6: Each report includes: detected condition, risk level, AI confidence score, clinical recommendations, patient details, report ID, and timestamp.
faq.q7: What do the confidence scores mean?
faq.a7: The confidence score (0–100%) indicates how certain the AI model is about its prediction. Even high-confidence results must be verified clinically.
faq.q8: Can I print or save the report?
faq.a8: Yes. Every report has a Print button. You can also save it as a PDF using your browser's 'Save as PDF' option.
faq.a9: Reports are stored temporarily in your browser's session storage and cleared when you close the tab.
faq.q10: Is my patient data stored on your servers?
faq.a10: No. EyeScreen AI does not store any patient data or retinal images on external servers.
faq.q11: Is the retinal image uploaded to a cloud server?
faq.a11: In the current version, the image is sent to a local backend server for processing and is not retained after analysis.
faq.a12: The current version is a hackathon prototype and has not been formally certified for HIPAA compliance.
faq.q13: Do I need an account to use EyeScreen AI?
faq.a13: Yes. You need to create a free account to access the screening tool.
faq.q14: Is EyeScreen AI free to use?
faq.a14: Yes, EyeScreen AI is completely free in its current form.
faq.q15: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
faq.a15: In the current prototype, you can create a new account. A full password reset flow will be available in future versions.
